mapper.select: SELECT id, domain_id, domain_entity_id, datasource_id, care_fields, event_name, event_type, condition_field_name, condition_field_value, output_topic, description, entity_id_name_map_table_field, gmt_create, gmt_modifed FROM domain_event
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO domain_event (domain_id, domain_entity_id, datasource_id, care_fields, event_name, event_type, condition_field_name, condition_field_value, output_topic, description, entity_id_name_map_table_field, gmt_create, gmt_modifed) VALUES (#{domainId}, #{domainEntityId}, #{datasourceId}, #{careFields}, #{eventName}, #{eventType}, #{conditionFieldName}, #{conditionFieldValue}, #{outputTopic}, #{description}, #{entityIdNameMapTableField}, #{gmtCreate}, #{gmtModifed})
mapper.select: SELECT id, domain_id, domain_entity_id, datasource_id, care_fields, event_name, event_type, condition_field_name, condition_field_value, output_topic, description, entity_id_name_map_table_field, gmt_create, gmt_modifed FROM domain_event WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, domain_id, domain_entity_id, datasource_id, care_fields, event_name, event_type, condition_field_name, condition_field_value, output_topic, description, entity_id_name_map_table_field, gmt_create, gmt_modifed FROM domain_event WHERE datasource_id = #{datasourceId}
